channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cannabis leaves contain potential medical compounds
item.description: Researchers have identified numerous previously unknown compounds in cannabis leaves, including a first-of-its-kind discovery.

item.title: Obesity research reveals new understanding of fat metabolism
item.description: Researchers have identified a protein involved in fat metabolism with unexpected functions, potentially reshaping current scientific understanding.

item.title: Study finds increased water intake doesn't prevent kidney stones
item.description: A large study investigated whether increased water consumption could effectively prevent recurring kidney stones, a common and painful condition.

item.title: Study Explains Formation of the Twelve Apostles
item.description: A new study details how Australia’s Twelve Apostles were formed, revealing the role of tectonic forces in their uplift from the ocean floor.
